794 J2910_MAJ_SRGRY_GI_TRCT_IND J2910_MAJ_SRGRY_GI_TRCT_IND J2910 Major Surgery - GI Tract/Abdominal Contents CHAR 1 Involving the gastrointestinal tract or abdominal contents from the esophagus to the anus, the biliary tree, gall bladder, liver, pancreas, or spleen - open or laparoscopic (including creation or removal of ostomies or percutaneous feeding tubes, or hernia repair).
